meta.title: MERN SaaS Starter Kit | Production-Ready in Hours
meta.description: Launch your SaaS with our MERN stack starter kit. MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js with pre-built auth, payments, and dashboards. Save weeks of development.

content.h1: MERN SaaS Starter Kit | Production-Ready in Hours

hero.heading: Launch Your MERN SaaS in Hours, Not Weeks
hero.subheading: Production-ready MERN stack with authentication, payments, and dashboards built in. Start building features, not infrastructure.

whatsIncluded.heading: What's Included
features: Complete MERN stack setup (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js)

timeSavings.heading: Time Savings
timeSavings.description: Skip the boilerplate. Start with a production-ready foundation and launch faster.

items.title: Authentication
items.description: JWT-based auth with refresh tokens, password reset, email verification.

items.title: Payments
items.description: Stripe integration with subscription management and webhooks.

items.title: Dashboards
items.description: Admin and user dashboards with charts, tables, and analytics.

items.title: API Structure
items.description: RESTful API with middleware, error handling, and validation.

productionReady.heading: Production Ready
points: Security best practices (helmet, CORS, rate limiting)
Horizontal scaling with MongoDB replica sets

finalCTA.heading: Start Building Your SaaS Today
finalCTA.subheading: Get instant access to the complete MERN stack starter kit.
